name: training-plan
description: Generate customized learning paths using Test-Teach-Test methodology with integrated concept-builder pedagogy. Decompose goals, design sessions, run interactive TTT loops with principle-first teaching (LaTeX, fully developed worked examples, CTQ mastery criteria, concept maps, comparison, deep-dive), concept file export, and a concept library. Includes mid-session checkpointing, persistent learner profiles, and cross-plan analytics.
